Test name: CMRm (25% Impact Point, ego 40 km/h, target 30 km/h)

Test Description

Car to Motorcycle Rear-end moving, representing the passenger car following the motorcycle travelling at a constant slower speed, and impacting it on the rear.

  • Regulation or protocol: ASEAN NCAP
  • Ego speed: 40 km/h
  • Target speed: 30 km/h
  • Impact point: 25 %
